fit_reason: Brand protection IP firm — meta-relevant to a Brand Pack DFY. Pilot: 4 LinkedIn posts about their counterfeit-takedown wins + 1 case-study landing page.
outreach_recommendation: Free pilot: 4 LinkedIn posts about recent Amazon counterfeit takedowns + 1 case study landing page. Risk: cbrannan may be junior staff with no convert authority. Mitigation: pitch is asynchronous via email — if she escalates to a partner, win; if not, no time wasted.

Marketing the firm vs. bigger LA IP firms (Knobbe Martens, Sheppard Mullin)
